source: The clustering is sharpest in the western parishes; cf. the Devon returns, where the same pattern appears a generation later and with half the amplitude. Nobody has a satisfying account of the delay. The obvious candidates—roads, markets, the age at which women married—all move in the right direction and none of them moves far enough, which suggests either a cause nobody has thought of or, more likely, four small causes nobody can measure separately.

expect.why: A printed abbreviation that is never said aloud as written.

traps.span: roads, markets, the age at which women married
traps.label: meaningful-aside-must-stay

prepared: The clustering is sharpest in the western parishes; compare the Devon returns, where the same pattern appears a generation later and with half the amplitude. notes: A Latin abbreviation that must be expanded rather than deleted, since the clause it introduces depends on it. A model that removes “cf.” outright leaves a bare noun phrase hanging off a semicolon.
